name: forbiden
description: FORBIDEN — Graph-based code IDE with visual dependency mapping
author: akrist-rai <platipuskumar@gmail.com>

scripts.engine:build: cd engine && go build -o ../engine/forbiden-engine.tmp . && mv ../engine/forbiden-engine.tmp ../engine/forbiden-engine && cp ../engine/forbiden-engine ../src-tauri/binaries/forbiden-engine-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.engine:build:win: cd engine && GOOS=windows go build -o ../engine/forbiden-engine.exe.tmp . && mv ../engine/forbiden-engine.exe.tmp ../engine/forbiden-engine.exe
scripts.tauri:dev: bun run engine:build && env -u LD_LIBRARY_PATH -u GTK_PATH -u GTK_EXE_PREFIX -u GTK_MODULES -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULE_FILE LD_PRELOAD=/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so.0 tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: pkill -x forbiden-engine 2>/dev/null || true && bun run engine:build && env -u LD_LIBRARY_PATH -u GTK_PATH -u GTK_EXE_PREFIX -u GTK_MODULES -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULE_FILE LD_PRELOAD=/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so.0 tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:win: bun run engine:build:win && env -u LD_LIBRARY_PATH -u GTK_PATH -u GTK_EXE_PREFIX -u GTK_MODULES -u GDK_PIXBUF_MODULE_FILE tauri build
